items.title: Contoso: Intro to Copilot Agents
items.description: Build your first declarative agent on the Contoso reference stack and ground it in a product catalog.

metadata.title: Contoso: Intro to Copilot Agents
metadata.description: Build your first declarative agent on the Contoso reference stack and ground it in a product catalog.

items.content_markdown:
## Overview

This partner lab from **Contoso Copilot Labs** walks you through building your
first declarative agent and grounding it in the Contoso product catalog.

## What you'll build

- A declarative agent with a focused set of instructions
- A knowledge source over the Contoso catalog
- A tested conversation starter

## Steps

1. Create a new agent in Copilot Studio.
2. Add the catalog knowledge source.
3. Add three conversation starters and test them.

> Syndicated from Contoso Copilot Labs via the content feed.

items.title: Contoso: Agent Governance & DLP
items.description: Apply DLP policies, environment routing, and governance guardrails to agents at Contoso scale.

metadata.title: Contoso: Agent Governance & DLP
metadata.description: Apply DLP policies, environment routing, and governance guardrails to agents at Contoso scale.

items.content_markdown:
## Overview

A 300-level partner lab covering governance: data-loss-prevention policies,
environment strategy, and guardrails for agents deployed across a large tenant.

## Topics

- DLP policy zones
- Managed environments and routing
- Audit and monitoring

> Syndicated from Contoso Copilot Labs via the content feed.

A one-day partner event. Attendees complete two hands-on labs and leave with a
